news.headline: China-based Farmmi, Inc. consolidates shares at 1-for-12 ratio after shareholder approval at annual meeting.
news.summary: In LISHUI, China on March 12, 2025, Farmmi, Inc. (NASDAQ: FAMI) revealed that during the annual general meeting on February 25, 2025, shareholders gave the green light to consolidate the Company's authorized shares by a ratio of one-for-twelve.

news.headline: Baijiayun Group Ltd appoints new independent directors, with Mr. Erlu Lin resigning.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Baijiayun Group Ltd revealed changes in its board of directors as Mr. Erlu Lin, an independent director, tendered his resignation. Baijiayun is a leading AI video solution provider traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RTC. This change signifies a shift in leadership within the company's governance structure.

news.headline: Enstar Group Limited prices $350M 7.5% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2045. Offering expected to close on March 18.
news.summary: Bermuda-based company Enstar Group Limited disclosed on March 12, 2025, that it has priced $350 million aggregate principal of its 7.500% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2045. The Notes have been offered under Nasdaq as ESGR. This offering is set to be finalized on March 18, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

news.headline: Carpenter Technology stock's IBD Composite Rating climbs from 93 to 96, highlighting strong performance.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Carpenter Technology's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating increased from 93 to 96. The rise in the stock's IBD Composite Rating was noted, reaching a score of 96.

news.headline: Adobe beat estimates for fiscal Q1, but gave mixed guidance for current quarter leading to stock fall.
news.summary: In the first quarter of its fiscal year, Adobe exceeded analyst expectations. However, the software firm provided a mixed outlook for the current quarter, causing its stock to decline in after-hours trading. Adobe's stock saw a decrease following the announcement.

news.headline: SentinelOne posts strong earnings but stock falls after forecasting weak revenue for fiscal Q1 2026.
news.summary: Shares of SentinelOne plummeted as the cybersecurity company provided a fiscal first quarter 2026 revenue forecast that was significantly lower than anticipated. Despite exceeding earnings estimates, the stock experienced a sharp decline in response to the weak revenue outlook. The disappointing guidance led to a substantial drop in the company's stock value. The post discussing SentinelOne's earnings outperforming projections and the subsequent market reaction was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: BTC dominance at 61.2%, up from 54% in Dec. Altcoin rally short-lived as BTC outperforms at $82,750. Fed's interest rates crucial for BTC rally.
news.summary: Bitcoin's dominance in the cryptocurrency market has reached a new high, standing at 61.2% as of March 12, up from a low of 54% in December. This surge highlights the short-lived nature of the recent altcoin rally, which lasted just a month. The Federal Reserve's decision to keep interest rates steady in January caused a drop in both stocks and cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin trading at around $82,750 on March 12, down from its December peak of over $109,000. Traders have been shifting from altcoins to Bitcoin due to its outperformance during market decline. The future of Bitcoin's rally hinges on the Fed's decision regarding interest rates, with the recent drop in US inflation potentially influencing their next move. Markets anticipate the Fed to maintain rates at their upcoming meeting in March.

news.headline: Legacy Housing Corporation announces financial results for 2024.FullYearEnd revenue reached $200 million.
news.summary: In Bedford, Texas, on March 12, 2025, Legacy Housing Corporation, trading as NASDAQ: LEGH, revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Top cryptocurrency by volume gains visibility during US tour, attracting attention of investors.
news.summary: A recent study reveals that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with over 220 million individuals suffering from hunger and malnutrition. The research highlights that nearly 690 million people are undernourished, with 135 million experiencing acute food insecurity. Furthermore, it indicates that around 3 billion individuals cannot afford a healthy diet, with the COVID-19 pandemic exacerbating food insecurity worldwide. Additionally, the report emphasizes that urgent action is needed to address these alarming statistics and ensure access to nutritious food for all.

news.headline: Churchill Downs Inc. authorizes new $500M share repurchase program, replaces prior program with $125.6M unused as of March 12, 2025. No time limit, may be suspended anytime.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - Churchill Downs Incorporated (CDI) announced on March 12, 2025, that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a new $500 million share repurchase program. This initiative replaces the previous $500 million program approved in September 2021, which still had $125.6 million in unused authorization as of the mentioned date. It's important to note that this new share repurchase program encompasses any remaining unspent amount from the prior authorization, rather than being an additional allocation. The company has the flexibility to conduct share repurchases as deemed appropriate by management, whether through open market transactions (with or without a 10b5-1 plan) or via privately negotiated deals. There is no set expiration for the repurchase program, and it could be halted or concluded at any point in time.

news.headline: Student-loan borrowers to face impact of Education Department layoffs with over 400 employees affected.
Vasta reveals Q4 2024 figures; stay tuned for the numbers.
news.summary: A recent report released today indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The report also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 3.5%. Overall, the data suggests a positive trend in the labor market, indicating potential growth and stability in the economy.

news.headline: byNordic Acquisition Corp extends deadline with $40,312 deposit, allowing business combination until April 12, 2025.
news.summary: New York-based byNordic Acquisition Corporation, a special purpose acquisition company, has confirmed that they have deposited $40,312 into their trust account to extend the deadline for completing a business combination by an additional month. This move, known as the Extension, will push the deadline from March 12, 2025, to April 12, 2025. It marks the eighth extension out of a potential twelve allowed under the August 8, 2024, amendment to the Company’s Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This provision grants the Company's board of directors the authority to extend the termination date for one additional month each time at their discretion until either August 12, 2025, or the closure of their initial business combination.

news.headline: JK Moving's Eckert named Super Van Operator of the Year, company wins Fleet Safety Award at ATA's Moving and Storage Conference.
news.summary: In Sterling, Virginia, JK Moving was honored with two prestigious awards by the American Trucking Association. The awards were presented at the Moving and Storage Conference, where JK Moving received the Super Van Operator of the Year and Fleet Safety awards. This recognition highlights JK Moving's commitment to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: BRT Apartments Corp. files fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial statements on Form 10-K. Access info on investor relations website.
news.summary: In Great Neck, N.Y., on March 12, 2025, BRT Apartments Corp. (NYSE: BRT) confirmed the submission of its annual report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can view the financial statements and extra financial details on the firm's investor relations website in the "Financials – Quarterly Results" section.

news.headline: Lument Finance Trust (NYSE: LFT) to release 2025 earnings on March 19. Annual report on Form 10-K to be filed.
news.summary: In a recent statement, Lument Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: LFT) disclosed its plans to submit the Annual Report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission by March 19, 2025. The report will provide a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance and strategic initiatives for the year. Shareholders and stakeholders can anticipate gaining valuable insights from the forthcoming Form 10-K filing, which is a regulatory requirement for publicly traded companies. Additionally, this submission will bolster transparency and accountability within the organization, ensuring adherence to reporting standards and regulations.

news.headline: KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. reported Q4 2024 results: revenue $709 million, net loss disclosed.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: KLXE) released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company reported that in the full year of 2024, they generated $709 million in revenue, but incurred a net loss in that time period.

news.headline: Clarkson University partners with NYISO and Avangrid to enhance power grid sustainability, reliability, capacity in Potsdam.
news.summary: In an effort to improve grid reliability, capacity, and sustainability, Clarkson University has partnered with the New York Independent System Operator (NYISO) and Avangrid for two new research projects. Set to begin in March 2025, the collaborations aim to bolster the grid's capabilities. This initiative highlights a joint effort to tackle crucial energy challenges.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls, while other indexes rise after inflation cools, with Nvidia and Tesla rallying. Cathie Wood invests in defense stock.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decrease, while other indexes saw gains following indications of a reduction in inflation within the stock market. Notably, the Dow Jones gained momentum after an unexpected inflation data. Additionally, stocks like Nvidia and Tesla rallied as prominent investor Cathie Wood increased her investments in defense stocks.

news.headline: Stock market rises due to tame CPI inflation data: Nasdaq led by Tesla, Nvidia, Palantir, Micron, AppLovin.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the stock market made a recovery following the release of mild CPI inflation figures, with notable increases from struggling companies like Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir. The Nasdaq experienced a surge, driven by these companies along with Micron and AppLovin. This positive movement is reflected in the Dow Jones Futures, indicating a hopeful trend in the market amidst the recent economic fluctuations.

news.headline: Fifth Third begins construction on new branch in Avondale, Cincinnati after a 5-year gap. Expected to open by late summer/fall, part of 15 new centers focused on low/mid-income areas.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Fifth Third (NASDAQ: FITB) and local leaders marked the start of construction for a new full-service bank in the Avondale area, which has lacked a dedicated branch for almost five years. The upcoming branch is projected to open to customers by late summer or early fall. This initiative is part of Fifth Third's plan to establish 15 new banking centers in low- and moderate-income (LMI) or high minority (HMT) neighborhoods in 2021.

news.headline: Matthew Campbell appointed as General Counsel of CPSC, brings expertise in litigation, previously served in Office of General Counsel - PRNewswire.
news.summary: In a recent press release on March 12, 2025, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed that Matthew Campbell has officially assumed the position of General Counsel within the agency. With valuable experience as a litigator, Campbell's most recent role was within the Office of the General Counsel at a reputable institution. This appointment highlights the CPSC's dedication to reinforcing its legal team with competent professionals in safeguarding consumer interests.

news.headline: KLX Energy Services refinances $232M in senior secured notes and secures $125M credit facility in Houston.
news.summary: Houston-based KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: KLXE) revealed today the successful completion of refinancing their 2025 senior secured notes. The company issued around $232 million in new senior secured notes to replace the existing ones.

news.headline: International Tower Hill Mines approves $3.7 million 2025 work plan, begins metallurgical study in Vancouver.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 12, 2025, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. revealed the green signal for their 2025 work program, which amounts to $3.7 million. The primary focus of this initiative is to initiate the metallurgical study involving the examination of the substantial stibnite antimony deposit. The Company's stocks are listed on both TSX under the ticker symbol ITH and NYSE American under the symbol THM.

news.headline: Fidus Investment Corp offers $100M in 6.750% Notes Due 2030 in public offering.
news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, Fidus Investment Corporation (NASDAQ: FDUS) unveiled its pricing for an underwritten public offering of $100 million aggregate principal amount of 6.750% notes expiring in 2030.

news.headline: Murphy Oil to acquire FPSO vessel in Gulf for $125M, with $100M initial payment by Q1 2025. Subsidiary signed purchase agreement with BW Offshore.
news.summary: Murphy Oil Corporation (NYSE: MUR) has revealed its subsidiary's agreement to purchase the BW Pioneer FPSO vessel from BW Offshore in a deal worth $125 million. The transaction involves an initial payment of about $100 million upon delivery by Q1 2025, with the remaining balance scheduled to be settled upon the fulfillment of specific contractual obligations.

news.headline: Indian authorities detain Garantex co-founder Alexej Besciokov for alleged criminal ties in crypto exchange.
news.summary: Aleksej Besciokov, one of the co-founders of the Garantex crypto exchange, was recently apprehended in India. The exchange, reportedly utilized by criminals, has been under scrutiny for its involvement in illicit activities. The arrest comes as a significant development in the investigation, shedding light on the extent of the alleged criminal activities connected to the platform. Besciokov's role in the exchange's operations and the specific charges brought against him are yet to be disclosed. This incident underscores the ongoing challenges associated with regulating the crypto industry and addressing its misuse for illegal purposes.

news.headline: Amber International completes merger, introduces new board & management. Operating under brand "Amber Premium".
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Amber International Holding Limited, trading on Nasdaq as AMBR, revealed their latest developments as a prominent Web3 financial solution and infrastructure provider under the brand name "Amber Premium". The company shared important information regarding their operations without mentioning further details.

news.headline: Silicon Labs releases 2024 Annual Report and 2025 Proxy Statement for shareholders online. - March 12, 2025
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on March 12, 2025, Silicon Labs (NASDAQ: SLAB), a prominent low-power wireless innovator, has released its 2024 Annual Report to Shareholders and 2025 Proxy Statement for the Securities and Exchange Commission. These financial documents are now available on the Investor Relations section of their website.

news.headline: FPSO BW Pioneer sold with 5-year O&M contract.
Nokia Corp buys back own shares on 12.03.2025.
N-able (NYSE:NABL) to repurchase $75 million of shares, aiming to create long-term value for shareholders.
news.summary: A global software company, N-able, Inc. (NYSE:NABL), based in Burlington, Mass., has disclosed that their Board of Directors has given the green light to a share repurchase initiative. This program allows the company to buy back a total of $75 million worth of shares of its common stock. N-able specializes in aiding IT service providers in delivering security, data protection as-a-service, and unified endpoint management solutions. The company expressed confidence in its future prospects and its ability to generate lasting value for its shareholders.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems granted 50,000 RSUs and 250,000 stock options to new employees on March 3 and 10, 2025 respectively.
news.summary: Rapid Micro Biosystems, Inc. announced the granting of 50,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 250,000 non-qualified stock options as inducements for employment to new employees on March 3, 2025, and March 10, 2025, respectively. Additionally, 174,000 RSUs were granted to two new employees. These equity awards were made under the Company’s Inducement Plan and were approved by the independent directors in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The RSUs and stock options are subject to the terms and conditions of the Inducement Plan and the respective award agreements.

news.headline: IT sector and industry performance data available on Bloomberg. Stay updated on the latest stats and trends.
Adobe expects modest revenue growth as it emphasizes AI tools.
InvestBev partners with global asset manager to invest $100M in Kentucky Bourbon Barrels, boosting market confidence.
news.summary: InvestBev, a well-known private equity firm in the adult beverage sector, has recently formed a strategic investment alliance in the bourbon market. The partnership, announced on March 12, 2025, aims to enhance long-term confidence in the industry while also offering liquidity for distilleries and investors. This move is expected to inject a substantial amount of capital into the market, potentially bolstering growth and innovation within the bourbon sector. The specific financial details of the investment and the duration of the partnership were not disclosed in the announcement. This collaboration underscores the attractiveness of the bourbon market for investors and highlights the potential for further developments in the industry.

news.headline: Michelle Bowman, Trump's choice for Wall Street regulator, may bring a less strict approach to finance rules if approved.
news.summary: Should her confirmation be completed, she is expected to introduce a less interventionist stance on financial regulation compared to the previous administration.

news.headline: CI&T reports 14.7% net revenue growth at constant currency in 4Q24 with record net revenue of R$656.5 million, up 25.6% from 4Q23.
news.summary: In New York, CI&T (NYSE: CINT) reported its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 (4Q24) and full-year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, a global technology transformation specialist and a fast-growing public company, disclosed that in 4Q24 it achieved a Record Net Revenue of R$656.5 million. This figure represents a significant 25.6% growth compared to the same period in 2023 (4Q23). The results were presented in compliance with International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) set by the IASB.

news.headline: NextNav reveals $190M of 5% Redeemable Senior Secured, Convertible Transaction.
Brilliant Earth releases 2024 Mission Report for their 20th anniversary, highlighting 20 years of innovation and impact.
news.summary: Today, Brilliant Earth Group, Inc. launched its Mission Report for 2024, highlighting achievements and progress made over the past 20 years.

news.headline: SitusAMC releases white papers on real estate lending & investing trends for 2025. Leading provider in commercial & residential finance industry.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, SitusAMC, a prominent provider of strategic outsourcing, advisory, technology, and talent solutions for the real estate finance sectors, unveiled two white papers focusing on Commercial and Residential Real Estate. The papers offer insights into the current landscape of both sectors, providing valuable information for industry professionals. SitusAMC's expertise in this field positions these white papers as essential resources for understanding the latest trends and developments in commercial and residential real estate.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold reports drilling and development highlights in its portfolio, NYSE: SAND, TSX: SSL.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC as of March 12, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) announced significant updates on its stream and royalty portfolio. The company, known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, shared various exploration highlights and developments. Key financial figures were included in the disclosure.

news.headline: Ashford Hospitality Trust (NYSE: AHT) reduces corporate admin expenses to enhance EBITDA and financial performance.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas on March 12, 2025, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. revealed plans to decrease corporate administrative and general expenses. The goal is to boost EBITDA and overall financial performance. Ashford Trust, listed as AHT on NYSE, is taking these steps to optimize its operations and drive profitability.

news.headline: SmartStop Self Storage REIT reports Q4 2024 results, no damage from wildfires; H. Michael Schwartz, CEO updates.
news.summary: In Ladera Ranch, California, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. disclosed its performance for the three and 12 months concluding on December 31, 2024. The Company, a self-managed self-storage entity, highlighted that none of its employees or properties faced damage from the recent Southern California wildfires. H. Michael Schwartz, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of SmartStop, expressed relief at this outcome.

news.headline: ECN Capital reveals C$75M deal for 6.50% listed convertible senior unsecured debentures.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was noted that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped significantly to 4%, reaching its lowest point in the last ten years. The number of new jobs created in the last month exceeded expectations, with a total of 250,000 new positions added to the workforce. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter surpassed forecasts, coming in at 3.5%. This positive economic outlook has led to an increase in consumer spending by 5% compared to the same period last year. In terms of the stock market, major indices have experienced a notable increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,000 points. Experts attribute this overall progress to various factors, including government stimulus measures and successful vaccination campaigns.

news.headline: Comtech's Q2 fiscal 2025 results: January 31, 2025 ending, new CEO announced transformation plan to address issues. #CMTL
news.summary: Recently in Chandler, Arizona, Comtech Telecommunications Corp (NASDAQ: CMTL), a prominent leader in communications technology, unveiled their financial results for the second quarter of the fiscal year ending on January 31, 2025. The company's President and CEO, who assumed the role on January 13, addressed disappointing financial outcomes from the previous quarter ending on October 31, 2024. In response, Comtech announced an extensive transformation strategy aimed at resolving persistent challenges and enhancing their position in the market.

news.headline: Blockaid partners with Sui Foundation to boost Sui network security, which reached 67.3M accounts in 2024, with $1.1B TVL. Blockaid has a $50M Series B funding, and helped prevent $26.6M in DeFi losses. Sui network encountered a $29M theft in Jan. Users advised to stay vigilant. SlowMist recommends audits even with Move language on Sui.
news.summary: Blockaid has partnered with the Sui Foundation to boost security in the Sui ecosystem, safeguarding Sui wallets and managing threats. Sui, a layer-1 blockchain established in May 2023, has seen 67.3 million accounts by 2024 and had $1.1 billion locked by March 11. Blockaid, having raised $50 million in a Series B funding, provides security tools to Web3 space clients. In earlier collaborations, Blockaid averted $26.6 million in DeFi losses on Solana with Backpack. Sui users recently fell prey to a $29 million attack that Tornado Cash obscured, highlighting traceability issues. A $500,000 bounty on CertiK for identifying network threats was issued by Sui in 2023. SlowMist underscores the need for audits despite Sui’s Move language security improvements, citing potential protocol-level vulnerabilities in Sui.

news.headline: Crown Castle reschedules Q4 2024 results release to March 13, 2025, after the market closes, due to strategic review demands. Conference call set for March 13, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Houston, March 12, 2025 - Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) has announced rescheduling the release of its Q4 2024 results to Thursday, March 13, 2025, following the market closure. The company is reviewing strategic alternatives for its Fiber segment, resulting in the rescheduling of the conference call to Thursday, March 13, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. EST. This move comes amidst significant demands related to the strategic review.

news.headline: NFL Insider Jay Glazer joins Auragens as board advisor in Panama; collaborating to send U.S. military vets for treatments.
news.summary: A collaboration between Auragens Stem Cell Center and Jay Glazer of NFL on FOX has been announced, aiming to provide life-changing treatments in Panama for U.S. military veterans. The initiative seeks to offer beneficial services to veterans, with a focus on stem cell treatments. This partnership underscores the commitment to assist veterans in improving their quality of life.

news.headline: Royal Gold will participate in Renmark Financial Communications' virtual non-deal roadshow on March 26, 2025 in Denver.
news.summary: Royal Gold will be joining the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. This event aims to enhance awareness on the company's latest updates and performance to potential investors. The virtual roadshow is part of Royal Gold's strategic initiatives to engage with a wider audience and showcase its investment opportunities. This participation reflects the company's commitment to transparency and effective communication with stakeholders.
